layers.name: Data Processing Utilities
layers.description: A collection of command-line tools for scanning, evaluating, and tracking portal and document data.

layers.name: HTTP Request Endpoints
layers.description: A set of route handlers managing application data, authentication, and system health monitoring.

layers.name: Frontend Interface Components
layers.description: A library of reusable UI elements and page-specific components used to build the user interface.

layers.name: Project Configuration Infrastructure
layers.description: The foundational configuration files, environment settings, and deployment definitions for the project.

layers.name: Authentication Type Extensions
layers.description: TypeScript declaration files that extend the authentication library's core type definitions.

layers.name: AI Agent Definitions
layers.description: A collection of configuration files and instructions that define the behavior and operational capabilities of automated AI agents.

layers.name: Core Shared Utilities
layers.description: A foundational library of shared modules providing database connectivity, logging, session management, and common data access patterns.

layers.name: Project Maintenance Scripts
layers.description: A set of technical documentation and administrative utility scripts used for project planning, data backfilling, and manual system inspection.

layers.name: System Validation Suite
layers.description: A collection of automated test cases designed to verify core business logic, data store integrity, and system integration points.
